completedStories.notes: Inspection-level verification per A-8 (no C++ test tier until Story 1-5). T4 executed before T3 due to dependency (story task numbers preserved). 1933 lines insertion across 16 files.

Inspection-level verification per A-8. T4 executed before T2/T3 due to compile-dependency chain (T1 → T4 → T2 → T5 → T3 → T6 → T7). Code-review cycle caught 1 CRITICAL (stray fi in header-lint bash, would have broken AC-1 enforcement silently) + 2 MEDIUM (mock default-null footgun, TOCTOU TODO breadcrumb for Story 2-1). CR-18: TOCTOU between ObjectDB::get_instance and target->call_deferred — inert in 1-4, must resolve in 2-1 before real JNI threads.

Pre-implementation [X] revision resolved 11 design/schema blockers (scenario regex broadened for 10_cycle; longest-prefix filename parser LOCKED; authToken opaque-string invariant DD-2; per-call adapter DD-1; corrId UUID; chainId/cluster validation DD-4; Gradle systemProperty DD-6). T7 ordering: T1 → T4 → T5 → T3 → T6 → T2 → T7 per revised Execution Order (compile-dep forces impl-first for the 2 test-paired ops). 8 iterative [R] reviews caught and resolved: clientlib-ktx JVM package correction (com.solana vs com.solanamobile); source-set registration miss from Story 1-2 (D-3); base58 hex-stub → real encoder; exception classifier mapped ERROR_NOT_SIGNED/AUTHORIZATION_FAILED/NOT_SUBMITTED to typed MwaError (not blanket ProtocolError); snake_case op-name parity between Fake and Real impls; corrId propagated into MwaResult.Success/Failure (backward-compat default-null). +102 tests: 74 Kotlin (45 MwaClient interface/DTO; 19 FakeMwaClient; 29 MwaClientImpl) + 54 pytest (40 validator + 14 existing). 5 LOW concerns logged: ProtocolContract exhaustiveness (CR-19), signTransactions/signMessages mock success-path deferred (CR-20), fake/real parity harness (CR-21), MwaClientImpl exception-path log test (CR-22), laim-content-guard xit( false-positive (CR-23).

reviewFindings.note: Per-task [R]/[E] reviews in lieu of formal code-review-agent spawn. T1 had [R] resolving signal-shape drift → A-12; T3 had review flagging AC-D-10 citation + arch §3.2 vs NoOp reconciliation gap (CR-26); T5 committed without pre-review halt (process error), retroactively [A]-approved after user reviewed diff; T6 had [R] resolving missing MWA_TESTING SConstruct isolation check. Post-implementation CI investigation on 2026-04-23 surfaced godot-cpp host-mode initialization segfault in ClassDB::register_class — resolved by A-13 (Option C: delete host-tier C++ tests, defer to headless-Godot tier per CR-35).

completedStories.notes: A-8 FLIPPED in T4 (C++ test tier wired) — then PARTIALLY REVERTED by A-13 on 2026-04-23 when godot-cpp host-mode init proved incompatible with DD-26 header hygiene. Key inline decisions (all in story Guardrails): D-1 method-rename connect/disconnect/is_connected → mwa_* (avoids godot::Object collision); D-2 test-mode drain harness via godot::Mutex+Array queue (DD-26-compliant); D-3 set_bridge_for_testing(unique_ptr) under #ifdef MWA_TESTING; D-4 request_id = 8 lowercase hex (matches Kotlin corrId from 1-6). Amendment A-12 documents the 2-param *_completed signal escalation from arch §3.2's uniform 1-Dict. Amendment A-13 retires the C++ host test tier (scons tests target, cpp_tests.yml, third_party/googletest submodule, both test files) — 6 TEST_F cases deferred to future headless-Godot tier (CR-35). MWA_TESTING scaffolding in source retained for future reactivation (drain_for_testing, snapshot_pending_for_testing, set_bridge_for_testing, dispatcher_for_testing). Coverage gaps on AC-1/3/4/5 and redeferred CR-8 tracked by CR-31..34 + CR-35 rollup. CR-18 untouched — TOCTOU window still inert in 1-5 after A-13 (no tests to exercise either branch) but Story 2-1 MUST resolve before real JNI lands. 11 commits: pre-T1 docs + T1 + T2 + T3 + T4a + T4b-B + T4b-CD + T5 + T6 + T7 close-out + A-13 retirement (2026-04-23).

baselineTests.note: Post-story-1-6: baseline refreshed from 55 to 157 (+102). Kotlin 26 → 74 (+48: 19 FakeMwaClientTest + 29 MwaClientImplTest). Pytest 29 → 83 (+54: 40 validate_fixtures + 14 existing unchanged). 2026-04-23 post-A-13: 6 C++ TEST_F cases retired (NOT counted in the 157 — A-8/A-13 track confirms the 6 never contributed to the baseline count because CI never GREEN'd). Kotlin + pytest baseline untouched by A-13.

tooling.build: scons addon (one-command redistributable); scons platform=android target=template_release; ./gradlew :plugin:assembleRelease
tooling.test: ./gradlew test (Kotlin unit, JUnit+MockK+FakeMwaClient); GUT for GDScript; ./gradlew connectedAndroidTest (instrumented, macos-latest + emulator + Fake Wallet). C++ host-mode GoogleTest RETIRED by A-13 (2026-04-23); future headless-Godot tier tracked by CR-35.
tooling.security: CI grep for Log.*(authToken|publicKey|SecretString.value); merged-manifest CI audit; dependency-verification.xml + gradle.lockfile; reproducible-build 2-runner byte-diff; release R8 smoke
